race.comment: INITIATE (3) consistent mare who returns after running some tidy races on the provincial circuit last time in work. Returns with the one 900m trial and anywhere near her best can win this for the new stable. PRINCESS PRUSSIA (6) was unwanted in betting on resumption with a fast finishing eighth over 1000m at Wangaratta. Well placed with the claim and can figure prominently. LETHAL LION (2) nice return at Tumut with a fighting second over this trip with the 59kg. Up in class and not to be overlooked. NOTAFONI (5) three-year-old filly by Anders from Tiffoni on debut today. Watch for any market confidence.
